_comment: v2.21.0 cache rate cards. FALLBACK rates used by estimateCacheSavings to compute the delta between cached and fresh input tokens. Primary cost rates still come from config.cost_rates (env vars CROSS_REVIEW_<PROVIDER>_INPUT_USD_PER_MILLION). Update these when providers change pricing — keep the file under source control so CHANGELOG bumps document the drift.

gemini.note: Gemini implicit cache is currently free; explicit cache has storage cost not modeled here
